bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table1 (id INT, name VARCHAR(255), value FLOAT) ENGINE=InnoDB;
CREATE TABLE test_table2 (ref_id INT, description VARCHAR(255)) ENGINE=InnoDB;
INSERT INTO test_table2 (ref_id, description) SELECT id, CONCAT(name, ' description') FROM test_table1 WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT t1.id, t1.name, t2.description FROM test_table1 AS t1 LEFT JOIN test_table2 AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.ref_id WHERE t1.value > 1.0;
